title: koeleria cumingii
intro: Koeleria cumingii, also known as Cuming's hair-grass, is a species of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. This plant is traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Koeleria cumingii include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, sore throats, and digestive issues, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. The herbal preparation of Koeleria cumingii typically involves drying the leaves and stems, which can then be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal purposes.
